text:
is a Bandai Namco online game for the PlayStation 3 and PlayStation Portable. It is based on the anime character Misato Katsuragi from the popular Rebuild of Evangelion franchise. Misato Katsuragi's Reporting Plan game profile, IGN This news subscription game could be played on the PlayStation Portable through Remote Play Misato Katsuragi's Reporting Plan official website, Outline and was exclusively for the Japanese market, with no plans for an overseas release. The game's models were created in Autodesk Maya. Misato Katsuragi's Reporting Plan, Autodesk User Case 

Overview

Interactivity includes real-time motion sensitive 360° zoom-in/zoom-out and character customization (hair style). Advanced customization (character's costume selection, scenery selection, etc.) and PSN Trophies are both unlocked with a service subscription.

The game uses high quality real-time Cel-shaded animation to produce anime like visuals. More on the Evangelion News Cast 

As in the animated series, Misato Katsuragi's voice cast is performed by Kotono Mitsuishi. The background music used in the game are European classical violin pieces.

The service was set to run from 06 June 2009 to 05 June 2010. Misato Katsuragi's Reporting Plan online game manual, Terms of Service PS(R)3 ダウンロード専用コンテンツ「葛城ミサト報道計画」の配信を開始
